expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: supporting issues stay context_only_no_defect_analysis and produce summaries
expectations.evidence: result.md and execution_notes.md state the contract requires this behavior, but also explicitly conclude it is not demonstrable/exercised with the provided evidence: execution_notes.md: "The benchmark focus requires demonstrating that supporting issues are routed as `context_only_no_defect_analysis` and that support summaries are produced." and "Provided fixture evidence contains no supporting issue keys ... With evidence mode blind_pre_defect, we also do not have produced runtime artifacts ... to verify." result.md: "we cannot demonstrate that Phase 1 will: keep supporting issues in `context_only_no_defect_analysis`, and produce the required ... artifacts, because no support inputs are present."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: Both files consistently frame the deliverable as a Phase 1 contract check and do not drift into later-phase work. result.md title: "(Phase 1 contract check)" and header: "Primary phase under test: phase1". execution_notes.md: "This benchmark targets phase1." and "Work performed: contract + fixture evidence check for phase1 obligations".
